raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Week's clarity recap","name":"What feels clear about your priorities right now, and what's still murky?","description":"Surfaces areas of clarity and confusion in current priorities.","purpose":"topic","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Punctuality impact","name":"I've noticed you're often late to work — how does that affect your workload and team dynamics?","description":"Explores how punctuality may be impacting workload management or team dynamics.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Current blockers","name":"What's currently slowing you down, and is any of it within your control?","description":"Identifies current blockers and distinguishes between internal and external factors.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Momentum drivers","name":"What's driving your current momentum, and what might stall it?","description":"Examines factors contributing to and potentially hindering momentum.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Project excitement","name":"Which project are you most excited about right now, and why?","description":"Identifies projects that energize and engage the employee.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Manager support needs","name":"What would you want more of from me to support your work?","description":"Explores areas where the manager can provide more support or resources.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Balancing workload","name":"How are you balancing your workload with the team's needs?","description":"Explores strategies for managing workload in relation to team obligations.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next steps priority","name":"Given what we've discussed, what's your priority for the next two weeks?","description":"Concludes the meeting by establishing short-term priorities.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Actionable takeaway","name":"What's the one thing you're taking away from today that you'll actually do differently?","description":"Encourages commitment to actionable change based on the discussion.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
